improvements.title: Fix vector/semantic search (embedding service)
improvements.description: Embedding service not running, all hybrid/vector searches fail with 500
improvements.expected_improvement: Enable hybrid search, expected 2x relevance improvement

improvements.title: Add Polish full-text search dictionary
improvements.description: No Polish stemmer configured, Polish queries use 'simple' regconfig
improvements.expected_improvement: Fix 33% zero-result rate for Polish queries

improvements.title: Implement RRF instead of linear score combination
improvements.description: Vector (0-1) and ts_rank (unbounded) on different scales
improvements.expected_improvement: Fix ranking inconsistency in hybrid mode

improvements.title: Add fuzzy/typo-tolerant search on content
improvements.expected_improvement: Handle typos, recover ~15% of zero-result queries

improvements.title: Set hnsw.ef_search parameter
improvements.expected_improvement: Better vector recall at query time

improvements.title: Use websearch_to_tsquery for better query parsing
improvements.description: plainto_tsquery doesn't handle boolean or phrase queries
improvements.expected_improvement: Better natural language and boolean query handling

improvements.title: Use ts_headline for snippet extraction
improvements.description: Currently returns first 500 chars, not relevant passages
